title: Fabricated Adventures
description: This Adventure RPG Modpack is designed to make progression feel more rewarding and encourage exploration. The modpack is designed with performance in mind and has plenty to do to keep you entertained for months!
body:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[World Generation]
- I added in William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld to enhance everything you see on the overworld, the new beautiful biomes are realistic and so creative that you will be in awe throught all your adventures

[Progression]
- I have added in the LevelZ which creates an amazing progression system into the game where you actually have to think how you want to learn new things. You can no longer dig down to get diamonds and get fully kitted within an hour of playtime.

[Structures]
- For towns I have added in Towns and Towers to add new Villages and have added Luki's Grand Capitals to Overhaul existing Villages, making them bigger better!
- I added in Moogs Structures and Structory to add new random encounter structures into the world to delve into and find exciting new loot

[Combat]
- I have added in Better Combat and Combat Nouveau. These Combat mods are going to change the way you fight, encouraging more thought when delving into dungeons or trial chambers.

[Visuals]
- There is a currated Resource pack list available for you to play with as you would like! I encourage everyone to give it a go and see what you think! The resource packs make the experience feel next level and all fit togther very well!
- There are too many mods that change and enhance the feel of the visuals in the game that I can spend forever going over so I will leave that up to you all to experience on your own!
